item.name: Spotted Stingray
item.description:
This ray of Marsh Ligaka is covered with a perplexing pattern, ideal for repelling potential predators.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: The white spots on the back of this ray are easily mistaken for eyes. Indeed, this may well be the point─to keep predators and prey alike guessing as to which way the wavekin is actually looking.
